videos.title: কাঁচের ওপারে | Beyond the Glass | Bengali Indie Rock Song | Ghost Composer
videos.description:
কাঁচের ওপারে (Beyond the Glass) is a dark Bengali indie rock song about invisible love, silent longing and emotional distance that can never be crossed.

The song explores the feeling of loving someone who lives in the same world but behind an invisible glass wall — close enough to see, yet impossible to reach.

Driven by haunting synth textures, industrial rock energy and melancholic storytelling

If you’re looking for realistic Indian percussion sounds for your workflow, do check out Streets of North India.

A fusion of raw Indian percussion energy with deep Afro house grooves. This track is all about rhythm, texture, and movement inspired by traditional sounds but built for the dancefloor.
From hypnotic drum patterns to organic layers, “Taka Rhythm” brings a cultural pulse into a modern club vibe. Close your eyes, feel the groove, and let the rhythm take over.
🎧 Best experienced loud.
